title: lavandula spica var. pyrenaica
intro: Lavandula spica var. pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean lavender, is a subspecies of the true lavender plant native to the Pyrenees mountains. It has been used in traditional medicine for its calming and soothing properties, with medicinal properties attributed to its essential oil rich in linalool and linalyl acetate. The health benefits of Lavandula spica var. pyrenaica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of restlessness and irritability. Lavandula spica var. pyrenaica can be prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or dried flower infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
